page: Microsoft Azure D48pls_v5 is a DPLSv5-family virtual machine running on the Microsoft Hyper-V hypervisor. It features 48 dedicated physical cores and 48 vCPUs powered by an Ampere Altra ARMv8 Neoverse-N1 processor operating at 3.0 GHz. The system is configured with 96.0 GB of system memory, yielding a memory-to-core ratio of 2.0 GB per core. It does not include local storage or GPUs, but it is premium storage capable.

Benchmark results show a strong multi-core CPU performance, with a stress-ng multi-core score of 84952.55. Single-core performance is average, with a stress-ng single-core score of 1822.69 and a Geekbench single-core score of 1084.0. Memory bandwidth is average, reaching 160.48 GB/sec for uncached large block reads and 77.04 GB/sec for uncached large block writes. The server demonstrates average performance in database operations, static web serving, and software compilation, though single-threaded text processing and bzip3 decompression are relatively weak.

The D48pls_v5 offers a cost-efficient profile for multi-threaded workloads that require high core density but have lower memory requirements per vCPU. Due to its 1:2 vCPU-to-RAM ratio, it is optimized for compute-heavy tasks rather than memory-intensive databases. It is well-suited for multi-threaded applications, static web serving, software compilation, and scale-out workloads that benefit from dedicated ARM64 physical cores without hyperthreading.
description: Microsoft Azure D48pls_v5 is an ARM64-based virtual machine from the DPLSv5 family, utilizing 48 dedicated physical cores on an Ampere Neoverse-N1 processor running at 3.0 GHz. It features 96.0 GB of RAM, providing a 2.0 GB per core ratio, and lacks local storage but supports premium storage. Performance benchmarks indicate strong multi-core capabilities, with a stress-ng multi-core score of 84952.55, alongside average memory bandwidth and single-core performance. This server is optimized for compute-heavy, multi-threaded workloads such as software compilation, web serving, and scale-out applications that do not require high memory-per-core ratios.
og_description: Microsoft Azure D48pls_v5 is an ARM64 virtual machine featuring 48 dedicated Ampere Neoverse-N1 cores, 96 GB RAM, and strong multi-core performance optimized for compute-heavy workloads.
meta_description: Microsoft Azure D48pls_v5 is an ARM64 virtual machine with 48 dedicated Ampere cores and 96 GB RAM, optimized for compute-heavy workloads.
tagline: An ARM64-based virtual machine featuring forty-eight dedicated cores and ninety-six gigabytes of memory for compute-intensive multi-threaded workloads.
bullet_points: 48 dedicated Ampere Neoverse-N1 ARM64 cores running at 3.0 GHz
96.0 GB of system memory providing 2.0 GB per vCPU
Strong multi-core performance with a stress-ng score of 84952.55
Premium storage capable with no local storage included
Suited for software compilation, web serving, and multi-threaded workloads
